witness.solution:
import Mathlib

theorem ramsey_sanity :
    ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin 2, ∃ (c : Fin 2) (S : Finset ℕ),
      S.card = 2 ∧ (∀ n ∈ S, n < N) ∧
      ∀ i ∈ S, ∀ j ∈ S, i < j → C i j = c :=
  ⟨2, fun C => ⟨C 0 1, {0, 1}, by decide, by decide, by
    intro i hi j hj hij
    fin_cases hi <;> fin_cases hj <;> first | rfl | omega⟩⟩
